title: VideoExtractionRecord
description: Structured extraction output from the video-analyst agent for one video

hook.description: Exact opening line or description of first 3 seconds of action

structure.description: Ordered list of narrative beats, named by function (e.g. 'pain_statement', 'product_reveal', 'cta')

novelty_element.description: The one non-obvious thing this creator did that distinguishes this video from others in the same format

product_in_frame.description: The product being sold or promoted, if any. Null if no product.

cta.description: The call to action, verbatim or paraphrased. Null if none.

pacing.description: Overall pacing rhythm of the video

sound_role.description: How audio contributes to the video's impact

template_replicability.description: How easily another product can be swapped in. 1.0 = fully generic format, 0.0 = creator-specific only.

notes.description: Additional observations about what makes this video work. May contain pain signals.

analyzed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this extraction was produced
